mapper.select: SELECT s.*, c.class_name, CASE s.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' ELSE '女' END as gender_name FROM student_info s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
SELECT s.*, c.class_name, CASE s.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' ELSE '女' END as gender_name FROM student_info s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id ORDER BY s.create_time DESC
SELECT s.*, c.class_name, CASE s.gender WHEN 1 THEN '男' ELSE '女' END as gender_name FROM student_info s LEFT JOIN class_info c ON s.class_id = c.id WHERE s.class_id = #{classId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_info (student_no, name, gender, age, class_id, phone, address, enroll_date, id_card, father_name, father_phone, father_id_card, mother_name, mother_phone, mother_id_card, remark, status) VALUES (#{studentNo}, #{name}, #{gender}, #{age}, #{classId}, #{phone}, #{address}, #{enrollDate}, #{idCard}, #{fatherName}, #{fatherPhone}, #{fatherIdCard}, #{motherName}, #{motherPhone}, #{motherIdCard}, #{remark}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE student_info SET name = #{name}, gender = #{gender}, age = #{age}, class_id = #{classId}, phone = #{phone}, address = #{address}, enroll_date = #{enrollDate}, id_card = #{idCard}, father_name = #{fatherName}, father_phone = #{fatherPhone}, father_id_card = #{fatherIdCard}, mother_name = #{motherName}, mother_phone = #{motherPhone}, mother_id_card = #{motherIdCard}, remark = #{remark}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE student_info SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM student_info WHERE id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM student_info WHERE class_id = #{classId}
